name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORT_STRONGPOINT
notes: INFANTRY STRONGPOINT (fortification, side-neutral, 0 gun-AI — infantry fight from it). Soldier logic: a central Bunker (large) is the hard core; two forward fighting bays built from bag-fence corners+walls give riflemen protected firing positions with primary arcs across the front (+Y), tied in to each other so there is no dead ground between them. A run of bag fences links the bays back to the bunker like a communication trench, so men can move between positions under cover. Earthen ramparts on the flanks give dispersion and stop enfilade. The rear is deliberately open (one covered entrance/exit) — a strongpoint that cannot be resupplied or reinforced is a tomb. Wire forward canalizes any assault into the bays' interlocking fire. Nothing is placed where it blocks a firing bay's arc.

objs.role: comms trench — links left bay to the bunker (covered movement)
comms trench — links right bay to the bunker (covered movement)
forward wire (left) — canalizes into the bays
forward wire (right) — canalizes into the bays
